info.title: MoodlewareAPI
info.description: A FastAPI application to wrap Moodle API functions into individual endpoints.

post.summary: Get completion status for activities in a course
post.description: Proxy request to the Moodle instance and return JSON/text response.

200.description: List of activities with completion status

modname.description: Module name (e.g., resource, assign, quiz, label, url, feedback)

timecompleted.description: Timestamp when completed (0 if not completed)

overrideby.description: User ID who overrode completion (null if not overridden)

valueused.description: Whether this completion is used for course completion

hascompletion.description: Whether the activity has completion enabled

istrackeduser.description: Whether the user is tracked for completion

uservisible.description: Whether the activity is visible to the user

rulename.description: Name of the completion rule (e.g., completionview, completionsubmit)

isoverallcomplete.description: Whether the activity is overall complete

get.description:
Proxy file requests to Moodle with session authentication

Accepts file paths like:
- /files/webservice/pluginfile.php/123/mod_resource/content/1/document.pdf
- /files/pluginfile.php/123/mod_resource/content/1/image.jpg

The backend appends the Moodle token securely from the session.

post.description:
Generate a one-time token for accessing a file via Office Live Viewer.

This endpoint:
1. Validates the user's session
2. Generates a secure one-time token
3. Stores the token in Redis with file path and Moodle credentials
4. Returns the token and public file URL for Office Live Viewer

The token expires after 60 seconds or after first use.

get.summary: Get File With One Time Token
get.description:
Retrieve a file using a one-time token.

This endpoint:
1. Validates the one-time token
2. Fetches the file from Moodle using stored credentials
3. Deletes the token after use (single use)
4. Returns the file to the requesting service (e.g., Office Live Viewer)

The token is deleted immediately after use to prevent replay attacks.
